headline: Nvidia Makes Trillion-Dollar Forecast at Annual Product Expo
summary: During a 2 1/2-hour keynote address, Huang announced plans to push deeper into central processing units — Intel Corp.’s home turf — and introduced semiconductors made with technology acquired from startup Groq.  The company even said it was developing chips for data centers in outer space.  At the heart of Huang’s message: Demand for computing power continues to soar, and Nvidia is uniquely equipped to meet the challenge.

content.title: Nvidia Makes Trillion-Dollar Forecast at Annual Product Expo
content.summary: During a 2 1/2-hour keynote address, Huang announced plans to push deeper into central processing units — Intel Corp.’s home turf — and introduced semiconductors made with technology acquired from startup Groq.  The company even said it was developing chips for data centers in outer space.  At the heart of Huang’s message: Demand for computing power continues to soar, and Nvidia is uniquely equipped to meet the challenge.
